channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Jack White @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-09-25 03:00 — Jack White at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Jack White's live performances are renowned for their energy and musicianship, making this a must-see event.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-12 03:00 → 2026-12-13 03:00 — Olivia Rodrigo at Oakland Arena. Olivia Rodrigo's rising star power and emotional performances promise an unforgettable concert experience.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz are known for their innovative live shows, blending genres and multimedia for a unique experience.

item.title: Lily Allen @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-24 03:00 — Lily Allen at Chase Center. Lily Allen's return to the stage with a theatrical performance adds an intriguing twist to her concert.

item.title: KATSEYE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-11-20 04:00 — KATSEYE at Oakland Arena. KATSEYE's tour promises a vibrant live show that blends various musical styles, appealing to diverse audiences.

item.title: Rise Against @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-23 02:00 — Rise Against at The Masonic. Rise Against's politically charged performances resonate with fans, making their show a significant event.

item.title: The Smashing Pumpkins @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-09 04:00 — The Smashing Pumpkins at SAP Center at San Jose. The Smashing Pumpkins continue to captivate audiences with their iconic sound and dynamic stage presence.

item.title: Bleachers @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-18 01:30 — Bleachers at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Hayley Williams' solo show is a chance to see her artistry beyond Paramore, promising an intimate experience.

item.title: Chayanne @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-10-12 02:00 — Chayanne at Chase Center. Billy Strings' blend of bluegrass and rock has garnered a dedicated following, ensuring a lively performance.

item.title: Journey @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-29 03:30 — Journey at Chase Center. aespa's live tour is highly anticipated, reflecting their rising popularity in the K-pop genre.

item.title: LE SSERAFIM @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-09-24 02:30 — LE SSERAFIM at SAP Center at San Jose. LE SSERAFIM's performance is expected to be a vibrant showcase of their talent and charisma.

item.title: My Morning Jacket @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-04 03:00 → 2026-10-07 03:00 — My Morning Jacket at The Fillmore. My Morning Jacket's reputation for captivating live shows makes their multiple dates at The Fillmore noteworthy.

item.title: Social Distortion @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-30 02:00 — Social Distortion at Fox Theater - Oakland. Social Distortion's punk rock legacy continues to draw fans, promising an energetic and nostalgic performance.

item.title: Sombr @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — Sombr at SAP Center at San Jose. Sombr's unique sound and engaging live performances make their tour an interesting addition to the lineup.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's laid-back style and strong fan base ensure a relaxed and enjoyable concert experience.

item.title: Kishi Bashi @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-26 03:00 — Kishi Bashi at The Fillmore. Kishi Bashi's anniversary tour promises a celebration of his unique sound and engaging live performances.
